extract.title: Token Nxt By NPCI (Page 5 of 7)

extract.fullText:
Token Nxt By NPCI
Required
Terms & Conditions*
These Terms & Conditions (“Terms”) govern participation in Token Nxt, an initiative by National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI) as part of Global Fintech Fest 2026 (“GFF 2026”). By submitting an application and/or participating in Token Nxt, the applicant (“Participant”) agrees to be bound by these Terms. 
1.Organizer

Token Nxt is organized by National Payments Corporation of India (NPCI).

2. Program Overview

2.1 Token Nxt is a curated showcase platform under Bharat AI Zone at GFF 2026, designed to identify and present innovative AI solutions in fintech and banking through live demonstrations.2.2 Participation is subject to a multi-stage evaluation and selection process, culminating in a final showcase of up to 20 selected companies.

3. Eligibility 
3.1 Participation in TokenNxt is open to: 
Startups, enterprises, and research-driven organizations operating in AI and deep-tech. 
Indian and global companies with solutions relevant to the Indian financial ecosystem. 
3.2 Additional requirements: 
Solutions must be fully functional and capable of live demonstration. 
Selected participants must ensure physical presence of representatives during the event (9–11 September 2026, Mumbai). 
4. Application & Selection 
4.1 Applications must be submitted within the prescribed timelines. 4.2 Selection is conducted through a multi-stage evaluation process determined by NPCI. 
4.3 NPCI reserves full discretion to:  
Approve or reject applications 
Request additional information 
Reclassify categories of applicants 
4.4 Maximum 20 finalists will be selected


36.
Please read the above "Terms & Condition" carefully before proceeding & Confirm I have read and agree to the above "Terms & Condition"

extract.title: Token Nxt By NPCI (Page 6 of 7)

extract.fullText:
Token Nxt By NPCI
Required
Terms and conditions
5. Evaluation Criteria The evaluation criteria for TokenNxt shall be decided by NPCI basis its sole discretion. 
6. Participation Benefits 6.1 Selected Participants will receive: 
One complimentary booth at Bharat AI Zone, GFF 2026 
Opportunity to demonstrate solutions to industry stakeholders, investors, and global audiences


7. Benefits are: 
Non-transferable 
Provided “as is” without additional guarantees or financial compensation. 
7.1 Participant Obligations Participants agree to: 
Showcase genuine, original AI solutions. 
Ensure accurate representation of their product and capabilities. 
Maintain professional conduct during the event. 
Bear all costs not explicitly covered by NPCI with respect to participating in TokenNxt (including travel, accommodation, logistics unless otherwise specified). 
8. Intellectual Property 8.1 Participants retain full ownership of all intellectual property submitted or demonstrated during TokenNxt (“Participant Background IP”). 8.2 By participating, the Participant grants NPCI a non-exclusive, royalty-free, worldwide license to use the Participant Background IP for the purpose of promoting Token Nxt across media, marketing, and other event-related communications. 

For more details please visit https://www.npci.org.in/token-nxt
